indice.titulo: Three autonomous systems. One AI brain.
indice.subtitulo: Each adapts to a different operational scenario: urban surveillance, autonomous aerial response or local perimeter defense.

lista.tagline: Turns any IP camera into an intelligent sensor connected to a response drone.
lista.descripcionCorta: We process video in real time from the client's existing camera fleet. When we detect a criminal event, we dispatch a drone to the location.

items.descripcion: We connect conventional IP cameras (no special hardware required), each registered with IP and GPS coordinates.
Our AI engine processes the video stream and detects faces, vehicles, objects and weapons.
Upon active threat detection, the system activates the drone from the nearest hangar and routes it to the location.
The operator receives the alert, watches the live transmission and decides how to respond.
Identifies persons of interest.
License plate, color and direction of travel.
Recognizes postures and silhouettes associated with carrying weapons.
Models trained to recognize confrontations and physical violence.

items: Municipalities with wide urban surveillance networks.
Malls that need immediate response to robberies.
Private companies in remote areas with limited security personnel access.
Warehouses with large perimeters and minimal staffing.

especificaciones.valor: Central server; connects via IP to existing cameras

lista.tagline: Leaves the hangar without manual input and hands live control to the operator.
lista.descripcionCorta: Drone designed and programmed by AI Robotics. It receives the central's signal, flies automatically to the target, and lets the operator evaluate before acting.

items.descripcion: The central sends the signal and the drone takes off without human input.
Navigation based on the GPS of the camera that triggered the alert.
Once on station, the operator receives the alert and takes control.
The operator decides whether to issue a deterrent warning, maintain surveillance or activate the authorized neutralization module.
Issues deterrent warnings to the target on the ground.
Real-time video and telemetry to the control station.
Only activated with explicit confirmation by the authorized operator.
Autonomous patrol on extensive properties — ideal for remote zones.

items: Reactive dispatch: flies when the system detects a threat.
Programmed patrol: runs predefined rounds without waiting for a signal.
Perimeter detection: if a camera or the drone itself spots unauthorized entry, it transmits an alert and starts defending.

lista.tagline: 30 cm tall. Edge processing. Defends without waiting for confirmation.
lista.descripcionCorta: Compact turret with a swiveling camera and on-device AI engine. Trained to detect weapons and perimeter breaches, it acts without waiting for instructions.

secciones.contenido: Many businesses feel powerless against armed offenders. Traditional cameras swivel and watch but don't act. Our turret flips that logic: it sees, decides and responds autonomously within a configurable visual range and rule set defined by the client.

items.descripcion: The camera swivels through different angles searching for threats within its visual range.
AI processing happens inside the turret, not on a remote server.
The client configures virtual fences and allowed time windows via software.
If it detects a weapon or a fence breach in restricted hours, it begins to act without waiting for confirmation.

items: Allowed and restricted time windows per zone.
Detection of armed persons even outside restricted hours.
Detection of aggressive behavior within range.

especificaciones.valor: On the edge — no server required
